scripts.test:rules: npx firebase-tools@13.35.1 emulators:exec --only firestore,storage --project demo-servicesos-rules "node --test rules-tests/firestore.rules.js && node --test rules-tests/storage.rules.js"
scripts.test:firestore-rules: npx firebase-tools@13.35.1 emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-servicesos-rules "node --test rules-tests/firestore.rules.js"
scripts.test:storage-rules: npx firebase-tools@13.35.1 emulators:exec --only firestore,storage --project demo-servicesos-rules "node --test rules-tests/storage.rules.js"
